name: Administrative Share Accessed
notes: This rule triggers when an Administrative share has been accessed.
bb_references: BB: An Administrative share Has Been Accessed

dependencies.name: Administrative Share Accessed from a Compromised Host

conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001108) Success Audit: A network share object was accessed
when an event matches any of the following BB: An Administrative share Has Been Accessed
when an event matches any of the following Administrative Share Accessed From a Compromised Host
TD_list: APPLY Administrative Share Accessed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001108) Success Audit: A network share object was accessed
AND when an event matches any of the following BB: An Administrative share Has Been Accessed
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Administrative Share Accessed From a Compromised Host
RED_list: Event name: An Administrative share Has Been Accessed
Event description: An Administrative share Has Been Accessed
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
